author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
content: Delivered: ferrum-ma fully implemented — MaskedArray<T,D> type, mask propagation on binary ops (union), masked reductions (mean/sum/min/max/var/std/count), filled/compressed, masking constructors (masked_where/masked_invalid/masked_equal/masked_greater/etc), masked sorting, harden_mask/soften_mask, ufunc support wrappers, is_masked/count_masked. 41 tests passing, clippy clean.
